name: Brass and Wood Wall Rail with Clips - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Organize your daily necessities in an orderly way with this Brass and Wood Wall Rail with Clips from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. The decorative wall rail features a wooden frame with a brass rail and clips for hanging coats, hats, bags, scarves, and other items. The golden and brown hue lends an appealing look that suits a variety of aesthetics. Whether mounted in your bedroom, bathroom, or hallway, this wall rail with clips keeps your space organized and clutter-free.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
